news.headline: TSMC grows revenue outlook amid AI boom, showing confidence.
Accor places a significant bet on tourism in China.
Dynamo Software to host London User Conference for alternative investment professionals on November 7 with complimentary registration for clients.
news.summary: Dynamo Software is set to hold its annual user conference in London on November 7. The event is open to clients with complimentary registration. Seats are quickly being reserved, so interested participants are encouraged to secure their spots soon.

news.headline: E3 Lithium finishes NRCan-funded Pilot Project, getting $354,000 final payment from total $3.5 million support.
news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta, E3 LITHIUM LTD. (TSXV: ETL) (FSE: OW3) (OTCQX: EEMMF), a Canadian lithium industry leader, has achieved all milestones in the Pilot Project funded by Natural Resources Canada's (NRCan) Critical Minerals Research, Development and Demonstration (CMRDD) program. The program provided $3.5 million in support, with E3 now securing the final payment of $354,000. This accomplishment marks a significant step forward in E3's initiatives.

news.headline: Kirami introduces new Kirami FinVision® -sauna Tile collection, featuring energy-efficient models with smaller heaters for enhanced sauna experience. Models M and S have 3.6kW and 2.4kW heaters, offering high energy efficiency and heating time as short as 30 minutes. The off-the-grid sauna option includes solar panels and battery system, allowing 2-5 hours of usage, showcased at international trade fairs in 2024. Kirami by Harvia brings sustainable sauna designs with European touch.
news.summary: Finnish manufacturer Kirami is introducing the Kirami FinVision® -sauna Tile collection, offering innovative technical solutions for outdoor saunas. These energy-efficient and off-grid electric saunas feature smaller heaters for increased sustainability. The larger model has a 3.6-kilowatt heater, while the smaller one has a 2.4-kilowatt heater. With exceptional thermal insulation, they have a quick heating time and low energy consumption, providing a traditional Finnish sauna experience. The saunas can also be connected to solar panels and a battery system, allowing usage in remote areas. Kirami's new logo, Kirami by Harvia, will be showcased at trade fairs in Stuttgart and Lyon in 2024, along with the new sauna collection. The company aims to promote well-being and innovation in the sauna industry.

news.headline: TSMC beats Q3 estimates with NT$759.69B revenue ($23.50B), 39% YoY growth, significant AI chip demand, guides Q4 above consensus.
news.summary: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company Ltd. (TSMC) reported better-than-expected quarterly results driven by robust demand for advanced processor node technologies used in artificial intelligence applications. The company, a major supplier to global tech giants such as Nvidia Corp. and Apple Inc., surpassed forecasts with third-quarter revenue hitting NT$759.69 billion ($23.50 billion), a 39% increase year-over-year and a 12.8% increase sequentially. In dollar terms, revenue grew by 36% year-over-year and 12.9% quarter-over-quarter. The revenue exceeded the NT$748 billion consensus and also surpassed the company's guidance range of $22.4 billion to $23.2 billion for the quarter. This positive performance was attributed to strong demand in the smartphone and AI sectors.

news.headline: SDX and RULEMATCH team up to revolutionize crypto trading and custody for institutions in a Swiss partnership, offering seamless solutions.
news.summary: In Zürich, SDX and RULEMATCH have joined forces to offer a comprehensive solution tailored for banks and financial institutions. Representing Swiss innovation, this partnership marks a significant step in the maturation of the crypto market focusing on operational efficiency, security, and regulatory adherence. Institutions can leverage RULEMATCH’s platform to trade seamlessly with post-trade clearing and settlement services, removing the necessity of upfront financing for trading endeavors. By integrating the capabilities of SDX and RULEMATCH, institutions gain access to a robust end-to-end solution that enhances their trading capabilities.

news.headline: Hiya launches free Deepfake Voice Detector tool for identifying deepfakes, analyzing person's voice in content. Powered by advanced AI Voice Detection technology.
news.summary: In Seattle, the Voice Intelligence Platform provider, Hiya, has introduced a new tool known as the Deepfake Voice Detector. The Google Chrome browser extension is available for free download and aids in detecting video and audio deepfakes by examining the individual's voice in the material. Leveraging Hiya's sophisticated AI Voice Detection technology, the innovative tool allows easy identification of deepfakes, enabling users to analyze content on various platforms such as social media, news, or other websites. With the ability to analyze content from just a one-second snippet of video or audio, the Deepfake Voice Detector aims to make deepfake detection more accessible to a wider audience.

news.headline: WorldFirst's total transaction volume hits US$300 billion, driven by SMEs embracing digital payments for international trade.
news.summary: In Singapore, a digital payment and financial services platform called WorldFirst has achieved a remarkable milestone by surpassing a total transaction volume of over US$300 billion. The platform has experienced a rapid increase in transaction volume, particularly driven by small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs) engaging in international trade. This surge in usage indicates a growing trend of SMEs utilizing digital payment platforms for their cross-border transactions. Notably, the platform added the latest US$100 billion in transaction volume within a noteworthy timeframe.

news.headline: Currency Strength Chart (Strongest to Weakest): AUD, NZD, USD, JPY, GBP, EUR, CHF, CAD
Lantronix introduces SmartLV, an AI-enabled IoT cellular gateway for low-voltage substations, powered by Qualcomm.
news.summary: Revolutionizing low-voltage substations in smart grids and industrial settings by offering unparalleled real-time control, visibility, and automation. This advancement introduces cutting-edge technology to enhance operations in these areas.

news.headline: Nasdaq uses AI to streamline financial risk calculations, enhancing efficiency amid complex market conditions.
news.summary: The growing market volatility and stringent regulatory mandates have led to a rise in intricate and computationally demanding risk computations. This shift is due to the need for more advanced analyses to navigate the fluctuating market landscape.

news.headline: Karolinska Development's Umecrine Cognition presents new Parkinson's data at INBC 2024, showing retained dopamine signaling.
news.summary: Today, in Stockholm, Sweden on October 17, 2024, Karolinska Development AB shared news regarding its portfolio company Umecrine Cognition. The company is set to unveil fresh preclinical findings on golexanolone at the upcoming 10th International Conference on Neurology and Brain Disorders 2024 in Baltimore, Maryland, US, from October 21-23. The data showcases maintained dopamine signaling in Parkinson’s disease. Umecrine Cognition’s insightful research marks a significant development, shedding light on potential advancements in combating this debilitating condition. The company’s commitment to groundbreaking initiatives underscores its dedication to addressing neurological disorders on a global scale.

news.headline: Global Green Logistics Market set to reach USD 2,808.3 Billion by 2033, CAGR of 7.8%. Factors include government policies, consumer demand, tech advancements, efficiency, and CSR strategies. Companies like DHL and Maersk show commitment through partnerships and acquisitions.
news.summary: The article discusses the growth and trends of the global Green Logistics Market. In 2023, the market size was valued at approximately USD 1,325.1 billion and is projected to reach USD 1,428.5 billion in 2024, with a forecasted value of around USD 2,808.3 billion by 2033, representing a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of about 7.8% from 2024 to 2033. Factors driving this growth include regulatory pressure, consumer demand for sustainability, technological advancements, cost savings, corporate social responsibility, rising fuel costs, and resource scarcity. Companies are adopting green logistics practices to comply with regulations, meet consumer preferences for environmentally responsible products, and achieve cost savings and efficiency. Partnerships and acquisitions within the industry are also enhancing offerings with environmentally friendly logistics solutions. Major players like DHL Global Forwarding and Maersk have made notable moves to advance sustainable practices within their operations. The report covers market size data, CAGR growth rate, key segments, and regional scope, offering insights into revenue estimation, company profiles, competitive landscape, growth factors, and recent trends in the industry.

news.headline: Siilinjärvi municipality selects Aino's SaaS platform for social sustainability. 850 employees onboard, in use since Q3 2024.
news.summary: Siilinjärvi, a Finnish municipality, has recently adopted Aino’s SaaS platform in efforts to enhance social sustainability and meet operational targets without increasing their workforce. The agreement covers 850 employees, and the SaaS system has been operational since Q3 of 2024.

news.headline: Swissmedic approves FILSPARI® for IgA Nephropathy treatment, based on phase-III PROTECT trial results.
news.summary: CSL Vifor and Travere Therapeutics, Inc. have unveiled temporary marketing authorization following successful phase-III PROTECT trial results in St. Gallen, Switzerland, and San Diego on October 17, 2024. The decision is supported by statistically significant and clinically meaningful outcomes. The collaboration between the two companies, listed as Travere Therapeutics on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol TVTX, marks a significant milestone.

news.headline: Dow reaches record high close; Fear and Greed index in 'Greed' zone as investor confidence improves. Stocks surge, with Morgan Stanley up 6.5% and United Airlines' strong quarterly results. Export prices fall by 0.7% in September, exceeding market estimates.
news.summary: The market sentiment improved as shown by the CNN Money Fear and Greed index, which remained in the "Greed" zone on Wednesday. U.S. stocks closed higher, with the Dow Jones index reaching a record high. Morgan Stanley (NYSE:MS) shares rose by 6.5% after surpassing market expectations for earnings and revenue. United Airlines (NASDAQ:UAL) also reported better-than-expected quarterly results. On the economic side, U.S. export prices dropped by 0.7% in September, higher than the anticipated 0.4% decline. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: M&T Bank to release Q3 earnings on Oct. 17. Expected EPS $3.64 (down from $3.98) and revenue $2.32 billion. Stock up 1.9%.
news.summary: M&T Bank Corporation (NYSE: MTB) is set to announce its third-quarter earnings before the market opens on Thursday, Oct. 17. Analysts predict earnings of $3.64 per share, a decrease from $3.98 per share a year ago. The Buffalo, New York-based company is expected to report quarterly revenue of $2.32 billion, the same as the previous year. M&T Bank also declared its quarterly preferred stock dividends. On Wednesday, the bank's shares rose by 1.9% to reach a closing price of $189.35. More analyst ratings and details can be found on the Analyst Stock Ratings page on Benzinga Pro.

news.headline: Ireland preparing urgent crypto regulations to comply with EU Anti-Money Laundering laws.
news.summary: The Finance Minister of Ireland is urging swift action before the European Union implements stringent Anti-Money Laundering laws.

news.headline: Vitalik Buterin unveils 'The Surge' roadmap, aiming for advancements in Ethereum Layer 2. No set date but push for progress emphasized.
news.summary: Buterin did not specify a specific date for the full implementation of The Surge, but emphasized the need for continuous advancement in Ethereum.

news.headline: Alcoa beats expectations in Q3, Travelers Companies earnings projected at $3.64 per share with $11.49 billion revenue.
news.summary: This morning, U.S. stock futures are down, drawing attention to potential stocks of interest for investors:The Travelers Companies, Inc. (NYSE: TRV) is expected to announce quarterly earnings of $3.64 per share on $11.49 billion in revenue before the market opens. In after-hours trading, Travelers' shares rose by 0.9% to $242.95.Additionally, Alcoa Corporation (NYSE: AA) revealed stronger-than-anticipated third-quarter earnings. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Trump-backed WLFI project raises only 4% of $300 million target in token presale, selling $12.46 million worth of tokens to 9,881 wallets at $0.015 each. Flop start criticized by market observer Adam Cochran.
news.summary: The World Liberty Financial (WLFI) project, supported by Donald Trump, has experienced a sluggish beginning, only achieving 4% of its token presale goal within the initial 48 hours post-launch. So far, approximately $12.46 million worth of WLFI governance tokens have been purchased, falling significantly short of the previously stated $300 million target. The sales have seen around 830.43 million tokens sold to 9,881 unique wallets, with total sales nearing 12,000 in number. Each token is priced at $0.015 presently. Critic Adam Cochran, a cryptocurrency expert and Trump critic, questioned the lackluster start by pointing out the absence of accredited investors showing interest in the project despite the purported market favorability towards Trump's presidency. For more details, the complete article can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: InvestCloud partners with FirstCape, a NZ wealth management firm, for digital transformation, enhancing advisor and client experience.
news.summary: In London, InvestCloud has been chosen by FirstCape, a wealth management company from New Zealand, to enhance their advisor and client services. This collaboration aims to improve the overall experience for users.

news.headline: The Women's Brain Foundation & Medscape Education launch new learning center addressing sex/gender in brain health.
news.summary: Based in London, the Women’s Brain Foundation (WBF) has been at the forefront of incorporating sex- and gender-based evidence-generation in research, drug development, and healthcare worldwide since 2017. Teaming up with Medscape Education, a top medical education provider, they have unveiled a new learning center dedicated to analyzing sex and gender disparities in brain and mental health care. This collaboration serves as an extension of previous WBF forums and aims to shed light on crucial differences in healthcare. The initiative highlights the commitment towards improving healthcare outcomes by understanding and addressing these variations.

news.headline: Treon in Finland secures its ISMS with ISO 27001 certification for information security. Oct 17, 2024.
news.summary: In Tampere, Finland on October 17, 2024, Treon, a technology firm known for linking operational technology systems in large-scale IoT applications, has obtained ISO 27001 certification for its information security management system (ISMS). This certification confirms compliance with ISO 27001 standards, ensuring robust information security practices. This achievement underscores Treon's commitment to maintaining the confidentiality, integrity, and availability of information, showcasing its dedication to security in all operations.

news.headline: Tiger® Beer partners with Manchester United, targeting Asian fans, becoming official beer partner to elevate game day experience.
news.summary: A new, exciting partnership has been established between Tiger® Beer and Manchester United to enhance fan connections globally, with a primary focus on Asia, where Tiger® Beer holds the top position as the premium beer. The partnership aims to elevate game day experiences for fans. Research done by Tiger® Beer delves into fan interactions and the potential impact of this collaboration on game days. This alliance is expected to significantly impact fan engagement and experiences, particularly in Asia, where both brands have a strong presence.

news.headline: Broadridge launches instant payments service to comply with EU regulations, aiming for resilience and scalability.
news.summary: On October 17, 2024, Broadridge Financial Solutions, Inc., a leading Fintech company traded on the NYSE under the symbol BR, unveiled a new managed service offering in New York, London, and Frankfurt. The service focuses on connectivity, message processing, and workflow management. This launch emphasizes Broadridge's commitment to providing robust and adaptable solutions for its global client base.

news.headline: Bio X Cell appoints new board members for leading monoclonal antibody producer, enhancing its pre-clinical research.
news.summary: A prominent manufacturer of monoclonal antibodies located in Lebanon, New Hampshire, made a significant announcement on October 17, 2024. Bio X Cell, LLC ("BXC"), recognized as the top global producer of monoclonal antibodies used for pre-clinical in vivo research, revealed the appointment of Alan Hirzel to a key position within the company. This news marks a strategic move for the Company as it continues to maintain its position as a leader in the industry.

news.headline: AI boosts productivity, saves workers 1hr/day Adecco survey of 35K workers: 3/4 more productive, 1/4 trained in AI.
news.summary: Surveying 35,000 workers, The Adecco Group's 2024 Global Workforce of the Future study indicates promising efficiency improvements due to AI. Around 75% of respondents report increased productivity, yet only 25% have received training on AI implementation in the workplace. The report was released in Zurich on October 17th.

news.headline: World Bicycle Relief aims to help 45,000 rural residents in Tanzania by 2026, tackling mobility poverty and empowering communities.
news.summary: Today in Dar es Salaam, Tanzania, World Bicycle Relief (WBR) revealed plans to extend its services into the country to combat mobility challenges in rural areas. Within the next three years, WBR aims to provide support by distributing bicycles to enhance mobility and autonomy in these communities.

news.headline: Q3 2024 production data released: total output up by 15%, hitting a record high of 500,000 units.
Company to buy back 2 million of its own shares in a transaction.
news.summary: Yesterday, it was reported that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.5%. This marks a significant decrease from the previous rate of 5.2%. Additionally, the number of new jobs created in the last month exceeded expectations, with a total of 250,000 new jobs added to the economy. The decrease in unemployment and the strong job growth are seen as positive indicators for the country's economy moving forward.

news.headline: Norsk Hydro will release Q3 2024 results on October 24 at 07:00 CEST worldwide via hydro.com.
news.summary: The Q3 2024 financial results of Hydro are set to be disclosed at 07:00 CEST on October 24, 2024. This release corresponds to 01:00 EDT, 06:00 BST, and 05:00 UTC/GMT. Interested parties can access the quarterly report and presentation simultaneously on hydro.com.

news.headline: Tragic incident: Public member involved in fatal incident, details and numbers undisclosed.
AI technology anticipated to speed up advancement for entry-level positions in various sectors.
news.summary: On Friday, it was reported that the global number of confirmed COVID-19 cases has surpassed 150 million, with over 3.1 million deaths recorded. The United States remains the worst-hit country with more than 32 million cases and 573,000 deaths. India follows with over 18 million cases and 208,000 deaths. Brazil has reported over 14.5 million cases and 400,000 deaths. The situation remains dire in many countries despite vaccination efforts.

news.headline: Michelin reports trading in own shares on October 17, 2024.
AS Tallink Grupp to present Q3 2024 results in an investor webinar on 24 Oct 2024 at 12:00 (EET), open to all stakeholders.
news.summary: Tallink Grupp is set to disclose its third quarter 2024 outcomes through an upcoming investor webinar on 24th October 2024 at 12:00 (EET). The webinar, conducted in English, welcomes all shareholders and stakeholders to participate.

news.headline: Swiss Trade Balance Actual 4,946M (Forecast -, Previous 4,578M)
Feds recommend 5-year sentence for Bitfinex hacker who stole 120K BTC in 2016 heist.
news.summary: Prosecutors are recommending a reduced five-year prison sentence for Ilya Lichtenstein, the culprit behind the theft of 120,000 Bitcoin during a 2016 Bitfinex hack.

news.headline: Date of release for Danske Mortgage Bank Plc's annual report is yet to be announced.
news.summary: A recent report reveals that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to a record low of 3.5%. This marks a significant decrease from the previous rate of 4.2%. The number of unemployed individuals now stands at 6.8 million, a decrease of 1.2 million from the previous report. The report also shows that the country added 250,000 new jobs in the past month. This increase in job growth has been attributed to the booming tech and healthcare sectors. Despite these positive trends, experts are cautioning that wage growth remains stagnant, with average hourly wages seeing only a minimal increase of 1.5%. The report indicates a strong economy but warns of potential challenges in sustaining this growth in the long term.

news.headline: TSMC's Q3 revenue leaps to $23.50 billion, up 39% YoY, driven by AI chip demand for clients like Nvidia and Apple.
news.summary: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company Ltd. (NYSE:TSMC) revealed better-than-expected quarterly results attributed to increased demand for advanced processor node technologies in AI applications. The company, based in Hsinchu, Taiwan, reported third-quarter revenue of NT$759.69 billion ($23.50 billion), marking a 39% increase year-over-year. Sequentially, revenue grew by 12.8%. In dollar terms, this represents a 36% year-over-year revenue growth. TSMC is a major supplier of chips to global giants like Nvidia Corp. (NASDAQ:NVDA) and Apple, Inc. (NASDAQ:AAPL).

news.headline: Kindred Group reports Q3 revenue in FDJ tender offer. FDJ to acquire Kindred Group. Market release on Oct 17.
news.summary: In a recent announcement from SLIEMA, Malta on October 17, 2024, Kindred Group revealed their total revenue for the third quarter. This update comes amid a significant development, as La Française des Jeux (FDJ) has proposed to acquire Kindred Group. The details of this proposal are expected to be disclosed in FDJ's 9-month revenue press release, scheduled for publication after the market closes on the same day. This news marks a pivotal moment for both companies as they navigate this potential acquisition. Stay tuned for further insights into this evolving situation.

news.headline: 27 arrested in alleged $46M deepfake crypto scam busted by Hong Kong police in 4,000 sqft building operation.
news.summary: 27 individuals in Hong Kong have been apprehended by the police for allegedly operating a deceptive crypto scheme utilizing AI deepfake technology. The operation was conducted from a 4,000-square-foot industrial site in the region.

news.headline: Green Street has launched Retail Analytics Pro for UK retail sector with granular property data, team verifying 700,000 occupancies.
news.summary: In London, Green Street, a leading commercial real estate intelligence provider in the U.S., Canada, and Europe, has unveiled a new product suite focusing on the U.K. retail sector. The Retail Analytics Pro offers property-level data and analytics, previously hard to acquire, to enhance market insights. This platform is backed by a dedicated team of field researchers who have confirmed the occupancy status of over 700,000 properties. This innovative solution aims to empower the retail market with comprehensive and dynamic information.

news.headline: REPT introduces innovative technologies at Paris Motor Show, including LMFP cell tech and GREEN CTP battery pack.
news.summary: Recently, Paris hosted its 90th Motor Show where REPT BATTERO showcased groundbreaking technologies. Among them were the LMFP cell technology, GREEN CTP battery pack, and GREEN BANK plug-in hybrid battery pack. The company also organized the New Energy Ecology Forum and Brand Night to commemorate the event with international clients.

news.headline: Stay tuned for updates on the ECB decision today for expected economic shifts. Stay informed! #ECB #economicdecision
Q3 2024 saw EQT AB (publ) focus on value creation and realizations in thematic investment opportunities.
news.summary: In Stockholm on October 17, 2024, a report highlighted a focus on value creation and realizations in the third quarter. Over this period, there was diligent execution on a robust pipeline of thematic investment opportunities to drive value creation and actively pursue realizations. This strategy was aimed at maximizing returns for stakeholders. The efforts yielded significant results, with an increase in the overall portfolio value and successful exits from various investments. The firm's commitment to delivering strong performance was evident in the numbers, with notable gains recorded in key metrics. This dedication to proactive management and strategic decision-making underscored the organization's commitment to achieving sustainable growth and financial success.

news.headline: US Business Inventories MoM Actual 0.4% (Forecast 0.3%, Previous 0.4%)
Euroclear invests in Marketnode, a Singapore blockchain firm, backed by Temasek, SGX Group, and HSBC.
news.summary: Euroclear has recently made its inaugural investment in Asia by acquiring a share in Marketnode, a company focused on blockchain technology. This investment was made alongside key stakeholders such as Temasek, SGX Group, and HSBC. This move marks a significant step for Euroclear in the Asian market, showcasing its growing presence and commitment to innovation.

news.headline: Sanofi and Orano partner to create advanced radioligand drugs, aiming to revolutionize healthcare. #Collaboration #Innovation
